channel.title: ByoGPT on Tech Blog
channel.description: Recent content in ByoGPT on Tech Blog

item.title: Running LLaMA server in local machine
item.description: Referencing the previous post, I will we can host a OpenAI clone which can be used by byogpt. Preparation (3 mins) Pipenv aims to help users manage environments, dependencies and imported packages and I will be using it in this guide. pip install pipenv llama-cpp-python uvicorn fastapi sse_starlette llama-cpp-python[server] pipenv shell For me, I need to run this command to install the server: LLAMA_OPENBLAS=on pip install --force-reinstall --ignore-installed --no-cache-dir llama-cpp-python[server] To run the server:

item.title: Developing BYO-GPT with Flutter
item.description: Developing a user-friendly interface to converse with ChatGPT via OpenAI’s API with your own openAI API token. Developing BYO-GPT with Flutter (Total Setup Time: 10 mins) In this post, I will develop a “Bring Your Own - Generative Pre-Trained Transformer”, a user-friendly interface to converse with ChatGPT via OpenAI’s API with Flutter. You may download BYO-GPT and check it out! Alternatively, you may wish to check out this BYO-GPT web version.
